completed_tasks.name: Online submit closes tab; clipboard_confirmed resets to idle after 3s
Binary opens at /v2 so window.close() works after submit

remaining_tasks.name: Human verification of SUBMIT-01 + SUBMIT-02 user flow (9 gates)

human_actions_pending.action: Run 9 verification gates in the live app and type 'approved' (or describe which gate failed)
human_actions_pending.context: Plan 22-04 is autonomous:false. All code is implemented and committed. Binary now opens at /v2 directly. Build with 'cargo build', run with 'cargo run -- review <file.md>', verify gates 1-9 described in the checkpoint, then type 'approved' to continue.

decisions.decision: Online submit (Approve/Send Feedback) closes tab after 500ms; clipboard_confirmed shows banner for 3s then resets to idle buttons
decisions.rationale: User feedback at checkpoint: tab should close on online submit; clipboard offline path should let user re-submit or do something else

decisions.decision: Binary opens browser at http://127.0.0.1:{port}/v2 instead of root
decisions.rationale: window.close() only works on tabs with no navigation history. Opening at /v2 directly avoids the root→/v2 navigation that was blocking the close. v0.5 worked because it was already at root.

next_action: Present the 9 verification gates checkpoint to the user, wait for 'approved', then run code review → regression gate → phase verification → roadmap update → PROJECT.md update → offer_next
context_notes: All 4 plans are implemented. Only human verification of the live UI remains before phase completion. Context was at ~70% when paused — recommend /clear then /gsd:execute-phase 22 to resume, which will spot-check summaries and skip to the post-checkpoint continuation flow.
